headings.text: Things to Do in Salt Lake

paragraphs: There are two main factors involved in planning the perfect trip: making sure everyone has fun and experiencing things you don't experience every day. Luckily, there's so much to see and do in Salt Lake, the hardest part about planning your trip will be narrowing down your options, which range from

In addition to Salt Lake's full calendar of events, there are thousands of interesting places, sights, and curiosities waiting to be explored. Check out the arts and culture scene, shop til you drop, take in some pro sports, research your family history, or get your nature fix in the mountains. Salt
sections.rawText:
Things to Do in Salt Lake

There are two main factors involved in planning the perfect trip: making sure everyone has fun and experiencing things you don't experience every day. Luckily, there's so much to see and do in Salt Lake, the hardest part about planning your trip will be narrowing down your options, which range from the weird and unusual to the beautiful and exhilarating.

In addition to Salt Lake's full calendar of events, there are thousands of interesting places, sights, and curiosit

headings.text: Get the Salt Lake Discount Passport

paragraphs: Experience Salt Lake and save as you go! Visit Salt Lake has partnered with local attractions, restaurants, retailers, to offer a collection of discounts and savings with this FREE, mobile-friendly passport. Download your passport today and be sure to check back regularly for new offers added.

items: 10-20% off food at select dining locations
20-25% discount on tickets for Sports & Performing Art Shows

sections.rawText:
Get the Salt Lake Discount Passport

Sign-up now and save!

Experience Salt Lake and save as you go! Visit Salt Lake has partnered with local attractions, restaurants, retailers, to offer a collection of discounts and savings with this FREE, mobile-friendly passport. Download your passport today and be sure to check back regularly for new offers added.

Deals Include:


	10-20% off food at select dining locations
	10-20% off merchandise at select locations
	20-25% discount on tickets for Sports
